name: aztec-h2b-duty-suggestion-webapp
description: Short-term hosted interface for the Aztec H-2B job duties suggestion tool. Employees pick a SOC code and optional NAICS industry context; the app pulls live data from the aztec-h2b-data Supabase database and O*NET reference files, then calls the Anthropic API to generate a four-part suggestion following the h2b-wage-lookup skill's methodology.
